tutorial.teacher_create_desc: Here you can create new Posts, Road Maps and Tests — your main teaching tools on the platform.
tutorial.teacher_notif_desc: Here you will see new students, reviews, complaints, and other important platform events.
tutorial.student_nav_desc: This is your main navigation menu. From here you can access all sections of the platform.
tutorial.student_catalog_desc: Browse the course catalog and find the right teacher for you. Thousands of road maps and lessons are waiting!
tutorial.student_tools_desc: Take a break with educational games or use the Pomodoro timer to study productively.
tutorial.student_notif_desc: Stay up to date — here you will see new lessons, messages and platform news.
tutorial.student_posts_desc: Your teachers publish useful articles, tips and learning materials here.
tutorial.guest_posts_desc: Here you can read educational posts from teachers on the platform.
tutorial.guest_login_desc: Register or log in to access courses, lessons, video calls with teachers and much more!
tutorial.tDash_videoRoom_desc: Create a video call room for one-on-one or group lessons. Share the link with students — they can join directly from their browser.
tutorial.tDash_history_desc: Access your call transcripts, saved bookmarks, detailed statistics, and your calendar with scheduled lessons.
tutorial.tDash_promo_desc: Enter a promo code here to unlock VIP access or a discount. VIP teachers can create paid courses and access advanced analytics.
tutorial.tDash_telegram_desc: Connect Telegram to receive instant notifications about new students, scheduled lessons, and important platform events right in your messenger.
tutorial.tDash_students_desc: Here you can see all your students, search by name or subject, and click on any student to see their progress, errors, and schedule a lesson.
tutorial.tDash_contentTabs_desc: Switch between your content: All, Road Maps, Posts, Services, and Tests. Here you can manage everything you've published.
tutorial.tDash_contentGrid_desc: All your published materials are here — Road Maps (structured courses), Posts (articles), Services (paid lessons), and Tests. Each card has quick edit and delete actions.
tutorial.crm_navbar_desc: Drag any block from here onto the canvas to add it to your course. Each block type serves a different purpose.
tutorial.crm_infoText_desc: Add formatted text: lesson theory, explanations, instructions. Supports rich text formatting.
tutorial.crm_media_desc: Embed images and videos. Visual content makes lessons more engaging and easier to understand.
tutorial.crm_audio_desc: Add audio recordings, pronunciations, or voice explanations for your students to listen to.
tutorial.crm_activeTest_desc: Embed a full interactive test directly inside a lesson node. Students complete it without leaving the course.
tutorial.crm_testLink_desc: Link to one of your existing standalone tests. Great for end-of-module assessments.
tutorial.crm_posts_desc: Reference one of your published articles or posts. Add supplementary reading material to lessons.
tutorial.crm_files_desc: Let students download study materials: worksheets, PDFs, notes, or any file they need for the lesson.
tutorial.crm_comment_desc: Add a space for student questions, reviews, and comments on this specific lesson node.
tutorial.crm_divider_desc: Split the course into sections or modules. Use it to separate different topics or difficulty levels.
tutorial.crm_drag_desc: Drag any block from the left panel and drop it onto the canvas. The tutorial will continue automatically.
tutorial.crm_panel_desc: Auto-Layout arranges nodes automatically. Paywall mode lets you mark sections as paid. Save stores the course.
tutorial.crm_canvas_desc: Connect blocks with arrows to define the lesson order and flow. Each arrow is a transition from one step to the next.
tutorial.ct_header_desc: Give your test a clear name. Use "Import from PDF" to automatically generate questions from a document.
tutorial.ct_form_desc: The name appears in the catalog. Description helps students understand the topic. Category makes your test easier to find.
tutorial.ct_menu_desc: Drag any question block onto the canvas to add it to your test. Each block type creates a different kind of question.
tutorial.ct_choose_desc: Classic single or multiple correct answer question. Best for knowledge checks and facts.
tutorial.ct_free_desc: Student types their own answer. Great for open-ended questions and written explanations. AI can auto-check it.
tutorial.ct_fill_desc: Text with gaps that students must fill in. Perfect for vocabulary, grammar, and recall exercises.
tutorial.ct_match_desc: Connect left and right items. Ideal for definitions, translations, and cause-effect relationships.
tutorial.ct_sequence_desc: Drag items into the correct sequence. Great for timelines, algorithms, and step-by-step processes.
tutorial.ct_highlight_desc: Student clicks to highlight the correct words in a passage. Excellent for reading comprehension.
tutorial.ct_scramble_desc: Rearrange scrambled letters or words to form the correct answer. Good for spelling and sentence construction.
tutorial.ct_dialogue_desc: Sort dialogue lines into the correct order. Perfect for language learning and conversational practice.
tutorial.ct_infoText_desc: Add explanatory text, theory, or instructions between questions. Helps structure the test into logical sections.
tutorial.ct_infoMedia_desc: Embed an image or video as context for the following questions. Great for listening or visual comprehension tasks.
tutorial.ct_infoAudio_desc: Add an audio clip. Students listen and answer related questions — ideal for language listening exercises.
tutorial.ct_drag_desc: Drag any question block from the right panel to the canvas. The tutorial will continue automatically.
tutorial.ct_save_desc: When your test is ready, click Save. It will be available in your course, your profile, and the test catalog.
